name: 38_Object_Tracking_Siamese_OTB50_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kufuatilia vitu kwa kutumia mtandao wa Siamese na seti ya data ya OTB50. Seti ya data ya OTB50 inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kujumuisha hatua za kuongeza data kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, zinazofanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mtandao wa Siamese katika `src/model.py`. Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinapaswa kurekebishwa katika `src/train.py`. Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanapaswa kuhifadhiwa kama `results/tracking_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya ufuatiliaji kwa kutumia OpenCV na hifadhi video za ufuatiliaji chini ya `results/videos/`. Zaidi ya hayo, tengeneza ripoti kamili ya Markdown inayojumuisha maelezo ya usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na mchakato wa tathmini na ihifadhi kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unaweza kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo kwa matumizi rahisi. Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.
Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

preferences.criteria: Video za ufuatiliaji zinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika azimio la juu na kujumuisha maelezo yanayoonyesha kitu kinachofuatiliwa.
Hakikisha mfumo una uwezo wa kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo, kuruhusu matumizi rahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/data_loader.py` contains only a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a static dictionary with a note string. There is no actual implementation for downloading or loading the "OTB50" dataset. The execution trajectory indicates an attempt was made but offers no evidence of successful dataset retrieval or loading. The code does not fulfill the requirement.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only placeholder functions (`build_transforms()` returns a list of strings) and does not implement actual data augmentation operations like rotation and scaling. The trajectory evidence indicates that augmentation operations encountered errors (memory limit exceeded, process terminated) and failed to save the augmented dataset, confirming that the requirement is not satisfied.

<UNSATISFIED>
The provided code in `src/model.py` does not implement a Siamese network. The file contains only a minimal placeholder implementation with requirement documentation and a dummy `build_model()` function that returns a string. There is no actual neural network architecture, no Siamese structure (e.g., twin subnetworks with shared weights), and no PyTorch/TensorFlow model definition. The trajectory evidence confirms the file executed without errors but does not provide evidence of a functional Siamese network implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The provided `src/train.py` file contains a minimal semantic implementation with a placeholder `train()` function. It does not show any actual hyperparameter tuning, definition, or configuration for learning rate and batch size. The code only implements a simple loop that sums numbers and creates artifact files, with no evidence of machine learning model training or hyperparameter management.

<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement is for tracking results to be saved as `results/tracking_results.txt`. While the file exists in the workspace structure, its content is `('placeholder\r\n', None)`, which is not actual tracking data but a placeholder string. The trajectory evidence confirms the file was created successfully, but the content does not constitute valid tracking results.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The requirement is to display tracking results using OpenCV and save them in `results/videos/`. The provided workspace structure shows a `results/videos/` directory exists, but none of the source code files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) contain any OpenCV-related code for displaying or saving video results. The `train.py` only creates text/markdown files in `results/`, not videos. The trajectory evidence mentions video saving operations occurred during execution, but the actual code files presented do not implement this functionality. Therefore, based on the provided code evidence, the requirement is not satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The `object_tracking_report.md` file exists but its content is `('placeholder', None)`, indicating it is empty or contains only a placeholder. The requirement specifies a detailed Markdown report including data processing, model training, and evaluation processes. An empty placeholder does not satisfy the requirement for a comprehensive report.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>
The requirement specifies that the Markdown report should include a section analyzing the effects of different hyperparameters on tracking performance. The provided evidence shows that the `object_tracking_report.md` file contains only `('placeholder', None)`, indicating it is empty or not properly generated. While the trajectory evidence mentions the successful execution of `tracking_performance_analysis.py` and creation of `hyperparameter_performance_summary.md`, the actual content of the required report (`object_tracking_report.md`) is missing the specified analysis section.
